books.title: Alive to Wonder
books.description: C.S. Lewis died fifty years ago this year. More than a generation after his death, Lewis's works are now more popular and widely read than at any point during his lifetime.

books.title: An All-Consuming Passion for Jesus
books.description: Friday morning, January 11, 2013 dawned frigid and dark in Minneapolis. John Piper finished his devotions, slid on his boots, bundled in his coat, and stepped outside...

books.title: Take Care How You Listen
books.description: Scripture calls us to consider carefully what sermons we listen to, and it also calls us to consider how we listen to those sermons.

books.title: A Tribute to My Father
books.description: My father turned 94 in heaven this year (2013). I have spent this afternoon listening to him as he read his poems and sang hymns with me.

books.title: Captive to Glory
books.description: My heart abounds with thankfulness for the gifted content team at Desiring God. When I look back over the years covered by this collection...

books.title: Charles Spurgeon
books.description: Everyone faces adversity and must find ways to persevere through the oppressing moments of life. But it's different with pastors.

books.title: Disability and the Sovereign Goodness of God
books.description: Disabilities break into life in various forms: genetic misalignments, tragic accidents, infectious disease, and degenerative effects of old age.

books.title: Killjoys
books.description: His wife was gone. The abandonment, the adultery, and the deception had mounted a massive assault on their marriage and family.

books.title: Love to the Uttermost
books.description: There's nothing intrinsically holy about particular days, but for most of church history Christians have set aside eight days between Palm Sunday and Easter Sunday.

books.title: Mom Enough
books.description: "Are you mom enough?" The haunting question hung in bold red text over a startling picture on the May 2012 cover of Time Magazine.

books.title: Sanctification in the Everyday
books.description: God is great, God is good, and he can do whatever he wants. God has designed that the salvation of his people not only involve his unconditional election...

books.title: Not Still Professionals
books.description: This short ebook is a celebration and extension of John Piper's book Brothers, We Are Not Professionals.

books.title: The Marks of a Spiritual Leader
books.description: Spiritual leadership is knowing where God wants people to be and taking the initiative to use God's methods to get them there.

books.title: The Pilgrim's Progress
books.description: The Pilgrim's Progress is a Christian classic whose importance is impossible to overstate.
